allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Major gameplay and UI improvements for Chess Magic

Game Mechanics:
- Fix linked cards to move with chess pieces when they move
- Implement complete undo system with FEN history tracking
- Add confirmation dialog when using free movement to capture a king
- Make king capture via free movement end the game with proper winner
- Fix win logic: capturing a king makes the opposite player win
- Linked cards now properly removed when piece is captured

Victory System:
- Add animated victory popup with celebration effects
- Implement dual-theme victory modal \(light mode for White wins, dark for Black wins\)
- Victory modal features pulsing animations and themed colors
- Add "New Game" button that returns to start screen
- Fix background theme to match winner when game ends

Board Improvements:
- Increase chess board size from 60px to 80px squares for better visibility
- Improve piece movement and linking feedback

Card Library Enhancements:
- Expand card library width from 300px to 400px
- Increase card display size from 120px to 150px
- Center and style "Card Library" title with uppercase and letter spacing
- Improve search input with larger size, better borders, and focus effects
- Enhance filter buttons with hover animations and centered layout
- Add shadows and better spacing throughout
- Card search now only searches by card name \(not text\)

User Experience:
- Clicking invalid targets or anywhere outside valid areas now deselects card
- Add page-wide click handler for intuitive card deselection
- Clicking on cards or valid chess pieces maintains selection
- Remove alert dialogs, replace with silent deselection for better UX
EOF
\)")
